ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jan-08-2020 Continued To Feb-05-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Nicholas Jay for Charles Ng (Administrator).

Mr. Jay stated this was essentially a double probate, that the primary asset is a property in Oakland that was owned by the Husband and the Wife, that the Husband died in 2013 and that they immediately filed a spousal property petition. Mr. Jay also stated that they attempted to sell the property, that the property has tenants and is in a high crime area, that it is not very marketable, and that they had a Buyer and it was set to close on July 31, 2019, but the Buyers backed out. The Court informed Counsel that there is no inventory and appraisal, stated that the Probate Referee needs to do a date of death inventory and appraisal, and that Mr. Jay needs to do a petition for approval of report on status of administration. Mr. Jay is to reach out to Mr. Lee (Probate Referee) right away. Status on close of estate is continued to February 5, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The above mentioned documents are to be filed by January 29, 2020.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
